name: Grilled Pompano with Smoked Tomato and Balsamic Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. Make one-half-inch deep slits two inches apart on both sides of the pompano.
2. Smoke for one hour at 200 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Remove the pompano from the smoker and lightly oil and season with salt and pepper.
4. Grill the pompano for seven minutes on each side.
5. Serve with vinaigrette.
